title: Connection lost in workflow editor after update
symptom: Users experience a 'connection lost' message in the workflow editor, preventing them from saving workflows. This issue appears after updating to version 1.95.2.
applies_when: Editing workflows in the workflow editor
not_this_if: No connection issues in the editor
root_cause: The issue arises from a problem with the websocket connection in version 1.95.2, which fails to maintain a stable connection, leading to frequent disconnections in the workflow editor.
fix_steps: Pull the n8n version 1.97.0 using the command: docker pull docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:1.97.0
Modify your docker-compose.yml file to specify the new image version: image: docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:1.97.0
Run the command: docker compose up -d to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update to n8n version 1.97.0 to resolve the connection lost issue.
